events.title: Spring Musical - 'The Wizard of Oz' - Friday Performance
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description: Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:00 PM. Doors open 30 minutes before showtime. Concessions available at intermission. Tickets: Adults $15, Students/Seniors $10, Children under 5 Free. Purchase online at woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted).
